          • "/api/v1/auth/register"

        • When the admin calls GET /api/v1/admin/pricing/urgency-multipliers

        • # com.uk.certifynow.certify_now.steps.PricingSteps.adminListsMultipliers()

        • Then the response status is

        • # com.uk.certifynow.certify_now.steps.RegistrationSteps.responseStatusIs(int)

        • And the response contains 3 multipliers:

        • # com.uk.certifynow.certify_now.steps.PricingSteps.theResponseContains3Multipliers(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable)
        • | urgency | multiplier | is_active |
          | STANDARD | 1.000 | true |
